/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libonset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so -o libonset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so CMakeFiles/onset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/onset_interfaces/msg/detail/launch_command__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/onset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/onset_interfaces/msg/detail/onset_status__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/onset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/onset_interfaces/msg/detail/stm32_message__type_support_c.cpp.o CMakeFiles/onset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c/onset_interfaces/msg/detail/stm32_state__type_support_c.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/ros/humble/lib:/home/gong/onset_ws/build/onset_interfaces: /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libonset_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
